document_info.prepared_by: Karen Weissman, Account Executive, Midwest Property & Casualty Group

business_description.nature_of_business: Industrial real estate investment and management — warehouse, distribution, and light manufacturing facilities throughout Ohio

coverages_discussed.notes: Property coverage on a blanket basis with agreed value endorsement. Wind/hail deductible applies per schedule.

positives: Formal business continuity and disaster recovery plan tested annually
Employee assistance program and workplace wellness initiative in place for over five years
All facilities maintain current fire suppression and sprinkler systems inspected annually by certified contractors
Contractual risk transfer provisions in all subcontractor and vendor agreements
All locations equipped with security camera systems and 24/7 monitoring services
Formal return-to-work program that has reduced lost-time claims by over 30%
ISO 9001 certification, reflecting commitment to quality and process control
31 years of continuous operations under consistent management demonstrates operational stability
95 employees with a structured HR program, low turnover, and consistent safety training
concerns: Loss experience reflects a mixed trend with some large individual claims in the review period
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: Over the review period, the insured has incurred 2 total claims with $202,875.00 in total paid losses and $238,554.44 total incurred. Currently, 1 claim remains open and 1 has been closed. Annualized loss ratio is 28.1% (avg annual incurred $119,277.22 against current annual premium $424,883.27 over 2 loss years).

extracted_text_sections.executive_summary: We are pleased to submit Buckeye Industrial Properties, LLC for your review and consideration. The insured is a industrial real estate investment and management — warehouse, distribution, and light manufacturing facilities throughout Ohio, headquartered in Columbus, with approximately 31 years of operating history. Coverage is requested for Commercial Property.
extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Industrial real estate investment and management — warehouse, distribution, and light manufacturing facilities throughout Ohio, headquartered in Columbus, with approximately 31 years of operating history.
extracted_text_sections.safety_programs: All facilities maintain current fire suppression and sprinkler systems inspected annually by certified contractors. All locations are equipped with security camera systems and 24/7 monitoring services. The insured has implemented a formal return-to-work program that has reduced lost-time claims by over 30%. Formal business continuity and disaster recovery plan tested annually. Employee assistance program and workplace wellness initiative in place for over five years. ISO 9001 certified. Structured HR program supporting consistent safety training.
extracted_text_sections.claims_narrative: The loss experience reflects a mixed trend with some large individual claims in the review period. Over the review period, the insured has incurred 2 total claims with $202,875.00 in total paid losses and $238,554.44 total incurred. Currently, 1 claim remains open and 1 has been closed. Annualized loss ratio is 28.1% (avg annual incurred $119,277.22 against current annual premium $424,883.27 over 2 loss years).
